transfer.title: Transfer money
transfer.subtitle: Move funds between your accounts or to a saved beneficiary.
transfer.noBeneficiaries: No beneficiaries yet. Add one on the Beneficiaries screen.

error.title: Transfer could not be completed
error.INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS: Insufficient funds in the selected account.
error.FRAUD_BLOCK: This transfer was blocked by our fraud checks for your protection. Please contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
error.DEBIT_DECLINED: The source account declined the debit.
error.CREDIT_DECLINED: The destination account could not be credited.
error.FAILED: The transfer failed and any debited amount has been refunded. Please try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
